mapper.select: /* AdminMenuMapper.getMenuList */ SELECT CASE WHEN MENU_PID = '0' THEN '#' ELSE MENU_PID END AS parent ,MENU_ORDR AS menuOrder ,MENU_DEPTH AS menuDepth ,MENU_ID AS id ,MENU_NM AS text ,MENU_TYPE AS menuType ,BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,MENU_URL AS menuUrl ,MENU_ICON AS menuIcon ,USE_YN AS useYn ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU WHERE SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} ORDER BY MENU_ORDR ASC
/* AdminMenuMapper.adminBbsList */ SELECT BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,BBS_NM AS bbsNm FROM TB_BOARD_MST WHERE SITE_CODE = #{siteCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC

/* AdminMenuMapper.selectMenuAuthList */ SELECT AUTH_GRP_CD AS authGrpCd ,MENU_ID AS menuId ,MENU_PID AS menuPid ,SITE_CODE AS siteCode FROM TB_MENU_AUTH WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId} AND MENU_PID = #{menuPid} AND SITE_CODE = #{siteCode}

/* AdminMenuMapper.selectMenuDtl */ SELECT A.MENU_NM AS menuNm ,A.MENU_ORDR AS menuOrdr ,A.MENU_TYPE AS menuType ,A.BBS_SEQ AS bbsSeq ,A.MENU_DEPTH AS menuDepth ,A.MENU_URL AS menuUrl ,B.USE_YN AS nttRdcntYn FROM TB_MENU A LEFT JOIN TB_BOARD_MST_FIELD B ON A.BBS_SEQ = B.BBS_SEQ AND COLUMN_NM = 'NTT_RDCNT' WHERE A.MENU_ID = #{mId} AND A.MENU_PID = #{mPid} AND A.SITE_CODE = 'admin'
